name: Zootia
street_level_visibility: Yuan-Ti remain the defining race, with Humans, Half-Elves, and Elves preserved as secondary populations through labor, trade, and imperial integration.
visitor_signal: Visitors to Zootia should perceive the dominant populations first and the secondary populations as stable but not polity-defining unless narrower locality canon states otherwise.
runtime_rule: Runtime narration may elaborate visible population mix but may not contradict canonical roster or exclusions.
